Class DiceController

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.controller.DiceController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class DiceController extends Observable implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
DiceController class contains the methods used in dice view, load attack screen, move armies, cancel move, cancel throw, continue Dice Roll, attack dice value, defence dice value and start dice roll.
Author:
Farhan Shaheen
